remarks: Charming 2nd-floor unit at 17 South Main Street, Norwalk, CT 06854 - bright, well-maintained space in a convenient location close to shops, dining, and transit. Move-in ready with comfortable living areas and ample natural light. Easy access to I-95 and the Metro-North rail line for commuters. A great opportunity in a desirable South Norwalk setting. No on-site parking available. No pets. No Smokers. Each occupant must have a credit score of at least 700. Two months' security deposit required. Rental application to be paid by prospective tenant. DO NOT WASTE MONEY ON APPLICATION, IF YOUR CREDIT SCORE IS NOT ABOVE 700.
